# Sure West Roofing

> Sure West Roofing is a Red Seal certified roofing contractor based in Cochrane, Alberta, serving Cochrane, Calgary, and Canmore. Owner-operated, no subcontractors, and specialising in residential roof replacement, roof repair, hail damage restoration, roof maintenance, roof inspections, and skylight installation.

## Key facts

- Business name: Sure West Roofing Ltd.
- Location: Unit 9, 225 Railway St E, Cochrane, Alberta T4C 2C3
- Phone: (403) 990-7210
- Email: info@surewestroofing.ca
- Service area: Cochrane, Calgary, Canmore, and surrounding Alberta communities
- Founded: 2020
- Certifications: Red Seal Journeyman, IKO ShieldPRO, WCB Alberta, Fall Protection, First Aid
- Primary shingle partner: IKO (Cambridge, Dynasty, Nordic)

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://surewestroofing.ca): Roofing contractor in Cochrane, Calgary, and Canmore
- [About](https://surewestroofing.ca/about): Red Seal certified team, company story
- [Gallery](https://surewestroofing.ca/gallery): Completed roofing projects
- [Free Roof Estimate](https://surewestroofing.ca/free-roof-estimate-cochrane): Book a free inspection
- [Services Hub](https://surewestroofing.ca/services): Every Sure West roofing service

## Services

- [Roof Replacement](https://surewestroofing.ca/roof-replacement): Full roof replacement with IKO shingles
- [Roof Repair](https://surewestroofing.ca/roof-repair): Leak fixes, shingle repair, storm damage
- [Hail Damage Repair](https://surewestroofing.ca/hail-damage-repair): Hail restoration and insurance claim support
- [Roof Maintenance](https://surewestroofing.ca/roof-maintenance): Annual roof maintenance programs
- [Roof Inspection](https://surewestroofing.ca/roof-inspection): Professional roof assessments
- [Skylight Installation](https://surewestroofing.ca/skylight-installation): Skylight installation and replacement

## Locations

- [Calgary](https://surewestroofing.ca/roofing-contractor-calgary): Roofing contractor serving Calgary
- [Canmore](https://surewestroofing.ca/roofing-contractor-canmore): Roofing contractor serving Canmore

## Tools

- [Roofing Cost Calculator](https://surewestroofing.ca/roofing-cost-calculator): Estimate a new roof in Cochrane

## Key differentiators

- Red Seal Journeyman certified on every job
- Fixed written quotes, no surprise charges
- No subcontractors, all in-house crew
- Text-first response, replies within minutes
- Free in-home estimates with 24-hour written quote turnaround
- $2 million liability insurance and WCB coverage
- IKO ShieldPRO installer status
- 5.0 rating across 80+ Google reviews
